appSandbox.description: Optional app sandbox (isolates main process; platform-specific).

configVersion.description: Config file format version. Used by ConfigMigrator to apply incremental migrations.

cron.description: Cron: scheduled tasks from config (schedule, description, enabled, command, channel, userId).

heartbeat.description: Heartbeat: periodic tasks (enabled, interval, tasks with channel/userId/target).

plugins.description: Plugin-specific configuration. Keys are plugin names; values are arbitrary JSON for each plugin.

sandboxMonitoring.description: Optional sandbox monitoring (log_level, log_output for sandbox audit).

showToolCalls.description: When true (default), all channels may receive tool execution progress; each channel can override via channels.*.showToolCalls.

toolResultPreviewChars.description: Max length (chars) of tool result preview sent to users (default 2048).

toolSandbox.description: Optional tool sandbox (exec and other tools run inside this).

AgentConfig.description: Agent configuration: runtime entity that references exactly one role. Role is discovered from ~/.synbot/roles/ (subdir name = role name). All agents use the same workspace from MainAgent.

role.description: Role name (must match a subdir under ~/.synbot/roles/, e.g. main, dev).

AllowlistEntry.description: Single allowlist entry: one chat (DM or group) allowed to talk to the bot.

chatAlias.description: Human-readable alias for this chat (for logs and UI).

chatId.description: Chat ID (user id for DM, group/channel id for group).

myName.description: Bot's name in the group (optional). When set, only messages starting with @my_name are processed.

workDir.description: Working directory for the child process in app sandbox. Defaults to `"~"` (home). config_dir() uses home.join(".synbot") or, if home fails, ".".join(".synbot"); so cwd must be home, not ~/.synbot.

enabled.description: Enable the browser tool (default true; requires agent-browser to be installed).

executable.description: Path or name of the agent-browser executable (default "agent-browser").

whatsapp.description: WhatsApp channels (WhatsApp Web multi-device via wa-rs). `whatsappPersonal` is accepted as a legacy config key (same shape).

CronConfig.description: Cron config: array of cron tasks (schedule, command, channel, userId).

CronTaskConfig.description: A single cron task from config.

chatId.description: Conversation id where to send result (defaults to user_id for DM).

DingTalkConfig.description: DingTalk Stream robot — clientId/clientSecret from open platform; receives via Stream CALLBACK, replies via sessionWebhook.

appKey.description: Alias for clientId (console may show "AppKey"). Ignored if clientId is set.

appSecret.description: Alias for clientSecret (console may show "AppSecret"). Ignored if clientSecret is set.

clientId.description: OAuth ClientID (formerly AppKey). Use this or appKey.

clientSecret.description: OAuth ClientSecret (formerly AppSecret). Use this or appSecret.

defaultAgent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

enableAllowlist.description: When true (default), only allowlist chats are accepted.

robotCode.description: Robot code from open platform (机器人 → robotCode). Required for file/image download API if callback omits it.

defaultAgent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

enableAllowlist.description: When true (default), only chats in allowlist are accepted; when false, allowlist is not checked.

groupMyName.description: When enable_allowlist is false, bot name/id used for group @ check (optional).

showToolCalls.description: When true (default), push tool execution progress to this channel.

defaultAgent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

fromSender.description: Only treat emails FROM this address as chat (e.g. "user@example.com").

imap.description: IMAP receive server (host, port, username, password).

showToolCalls.description: When true (default), push tool execution progress to this channel.

smtp.description: SMTP send server (host, port, username, password).

startTime.description: Only process emails received after this time (RFC3339 or date-only "YYYY-MM-DD").

EmailServerConfig.description: Email account and transport settings (IMAP receive, SMTP send).

useTls.description: Use TLS (e.g. IMAPS 993, SMTPS 465). When false, use STARTTLS on plain port.

defaultAgent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

enableAllowlist.description: When true (default), only chats in allowlist are accepted; when false, allowlist is not checked.

groupMyName.description: When enable_allowlist is false, bot name used for group @ check (optional).

showToolCalls.description: When true (default), push tool execution progress to this channel.

HeartbeatConfig.description: Heartbeat: periodic execution of tasks from config, results sent to configured channel/user.

HeartbeatTask.description: A single heartbeat task: run periodically and send result to the given channel/chat.

chatId.description: Conversation id (group id or user id for DM) where to send the result.

target.description: Task content to execute (e.g. "list files in current directory").

userId.description: User id of the task creator (for display / reply_to).

provider.description: Provider name (e.g. "openai" or a key in providers.extra).

agent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

allowlist.description: Allowlist of IRC nicks allowed to interact with the bot. If empty, all senders are allowed.

channels.description: List of IRC channels to join (e.g. ["#general", "#dev"]).

enabled.description: Whether this IRC channel is enabled.

nickname.description: Bot nickname on the IRC server.

password.description: NickServ password or SASL password for authentication.

port.description: IRC server port (default 6697 for TLS, 6667 for plain).

server.description: IRC server hostname or IP address.

format.description: Log format: json, text, compact, pretty

level.description: Log level: trace, debug, info, warn, error

maxFileSizeMb.description: Maximum size of each log file in MB

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of log files to keep

showFile.description: Show file and line number in logs

timestampFormat.description: Timestamp format: rfc3339, local, utc, custom

maxChatHistoryMessages.description: Maximum number of chat history messages to send to the model (most recent N). Default 20.

maxConsecutiveToolErrors.description: Maximum consecutive tool failures before stopping. Default 8.

subagentTaskTimeoutSecs.description: Timeout in seconds for each subagent/directive task. When exceeded, the task is marked failed and the slot is freed. Default 600 (10 min).

accessToken.description: Access token (optional). When set, login is skipped and this token is used.

defaultAgent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

groupMyName.description: When enable_allowlist is false, bot user id for @mention check in rooms (optional).

homeserverUrl.description: Matrix homeserver URL (e.g. "https://matrix.example.org"). Required when enabled.

password.description: Password for login. Ignored if access_token is set.

username.description: Bot user ID (e.g. "@bot:example.org") or localpart for login.

McpServerConfig.description: Configuration for a single MCP server.

id.description: Unique id for this server (used in logs and optional tool name prefix).

toolNamePrefix.description: Optional prefix for registered tool names to avoid collisions (e.g. "mcp_fs_").

McpTransport.description: MCP server transport: stdio (subprocess) or SSE (HTTP).

defaultLevel.description: Default permission level when no rule matches.

rules.description: List of permission rules (matched in order).

extra.description: Extra provider entries for plugin-registered providers. Key = provider name as used in config (e.g. mainAgent.provider).

kimiCode.description: Kimi Code (Moonshot coding API). Uses OpenAI-compatible chat completions; set api_base if using a custom endpoint.

mountSkillsDir.description: When true (default), mount host skills dir into tool sandbox at /skills (read-only). When false, do not mount; exec in sandbox cannot access skills by path.

SandboxResourceConfig.description: Resource limits; max_memory and max_disk can be "2G", "512M", or bytes number.

appToken.description: App-level token (xapp-...) for Socket Mode connection. Required for receiving events.

defaultAgent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

enableAllowlist.description: When true (default), only chats in allowlist are accepted; when false, allowlist is not checked.

groupMyName.description: When enable_allowlist is false, bot user id used for channel @ check (optional).

showToolCalls.description: When true (default), push tool execution progress to this channel.

token.description: Bot token (xoxb-...) for Web API (e.g. chat.postMessage). Required for sending messages.

defaultAgent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

enableAllowlist.description: When true (default), only chats in allowlist are accepted; when false, allowlist is not checked.

groupMyName.description: When enable_allowlist is false, bot name used for group @ check (optional).

name.description: Unique channel name (used to associate channel; default "telegram").

showToolCalls.description: When true (default), push tool execution progress to this channel.

deleteOnStart.description: When true, remove existing container with the same name and create fresh on each start. When false (default), reuse existing container if found (start it if stopped).

sandboxName.description: Container name for the tool sandbox. Default "synbot-tool".

sandboxType.description: Tool sandbox backend: "gvisor-docker" (default), "plain-docker". On Windows also "wsl2-gvisor". If the environment does not match (e.g. gVisor not installed), tool sandbox will fail; change this to an available type (e.g. "plain-docker") to run.

generation.description: Image, video, and speech generation tools (provider + output_dir per type).

mcp.description: MCP servers to connect; their tools are registered as synbot tools.

showToolCalls.description: When true (default), push tool execution progress to web clients.

WebSearchBackend.description: Which search backend to use for web_search.

oneOf.description: DuckDuckGo HTML scraping — no API key required (default).

braveApiKey.description: Legacy Brave API key (kept for backwards compatibility; sets backend=brave when non-empty).

firecrawlApiKey.description: Firecrawl API key (used when backend == Firecrawl). Get one at https://firecrawl.dev

searchBackend.description: Active search backend. Defaults to duckDuckGo when not set.

tavilyApiKey.description: Tavily Search API key (used when backend == Tavily). Get one at https://app.tavily.com/

WhatsAppConfig.description:
WhatsApp channel configuration (WhatsApp Web multi-device via wa-rs).

Link the account with QR or pair code; session is persisted under `session_dir`.

agent.description: Agent to use for this channel (e.g. "main", "dev"). Default "main".

allowlist.description: Allowlist of sender IDs / phone numbers allowed to interact with the bot. If empty, all senders are allowed.

enabled.description: Whether this WhatsApp channel is enabled.

sessionDir.description: Directory used to persist the wa-rs session (SQLite DB, creds, etc.). Example: "~/.synbot/sessions/whatsapp".

userInputTimeoutSecs.description: Timeout in seconds when a step waits for user input (default 1800 = 30 min).

workflowsRoot.description: Root directory for workflow state files. When empty, uses config_dir/workflows.
